proof_obligations.fail_condition: The artifact is absent, substituted, contradicted, or quality evidence is incomplete.
proof_obligations.pass_condition: The trace has at most four calls and retry delays are exactly 1s, 2s, and 4s.
proof_obligations.procedure: Inspect an isolated retry trace for one initial call and at most three retries.

requirements.observable_outcome: A retry trace shows at most four calls and backoff delays 1s, 2s, and 4s in order.
requirements.statement: Implement one initial attempt plus up to three retries, maximum four total calls, with delays of 1s, 2s, and 4s.

success_statement: Retry behavior is exactly one initial attempt plus up to three retries, maximum four total calls, with delays of 1s, 2s, and 4s.
